0.html:
Chapter 0 Worksheet: Intro to Office Software

Name: [Type Name]

Part 1: Vocabulary Matching

Options:
A. Document creation tool | B. Calculation software
C. Slide presentation | D. Email and calendar
E. Cloud file storage | F. Real-time collaboration
G. File format for Word | H. Mobile office app

2. Excel [___]

3. PowerPoint [___]

4. Outlook [___]

5. Google Drive [___]

6. Google Docs [___]

7. .docx [___]

8. Office Mobile [___]

Part 2: Multiple Choice

9. Which Office application is best for creating budgets? [___]
a) Word b) Excel c) PowerPoint d) Outlook

10. What is the main advantage of cloud-based Office software? [___]
a) Works offline only b) Real-time collaboration c) No internet needed d) Free forever

11. File extension for Excel spreadsheets? [___]
a) .docx b) .xlsx c) .pptx d) .pdf

12. Purpose of templates in Office software? [___]
a) Save disk space b) Quick document creation c) Hide features d) Backup files

Part 3: Short Answer

13. Explain the difference between saving locally vs. saving to the cloud.
[Type your answer here...]

14. Describe three essential Office skills for college success.
[Type your answer here...]

7. SSD          [___]

Part 2: Multiple Choice

a) ALU   b) Control Unit   c) SSD   d) Power Supply

10. Correct order of the CPU cycle? [___]

11. Example of an "Input" device? [___]
a) Monitor   b) Printer   c) Speaker   d) Webcam

12. Why is SSD preferred over HDD? [___]
a) Cheaper   b) Spinning platter   c) Faster, no moving parts

13. Smart microwave is an example of: [___]
a) General Purpose   b) Embedded System   c) OS

Part 3 & 4: Short Answer

[Type your answer here...]
